org.docgene.help.model

Class ArticlesModel

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.help.model.ArticlesModel

  • public class ArticlesModel
extends java.lang.Object
    Represents the articles model.

      Return true if the search is limited.

      Return true if there is a stylesheet theme.

      Return true if an URL correspond to an article.

      Return true if the full text search index must be compressed (the level is greater or equal to 2).

      Reset the stylesheet theme.

        Return the current stylesheet theme.

      • setStyleSheetTheme

        public boolean setStyleSheetTheme(java.lang.String id)
        Set the current stylesheet theme to a specified theme id.
        Parameters:
        id - the theme id
        Returns:
        true if the stylesheet theme could be set

      • setFullTextSearch

        public void setFullTextSearch(java.net.URL url)
        Set the URL of the fullTextSearch json file.
        Parameters:
        url - the URL of the fullTextSearch json file

      • setHelpFormat

        public void setHelpFormat(short helpFormat)
        Set the help format. It can be:
        • HELPFORMAT_UNDEFINED for an undefined help content format
        • HELPFORMAT_SWING for a help content optimized for Swing
        • HELPFORMAT_JAVAFX for a help content optimized for JavaFX
        A help format optimized for one UI framework and viewer on another will not be viewer correctly for images.
        Parameters:
        helpFormat - the help format

      • getHelpFormat

        public short getHelpFormat()
        Return the help format.
        Returns:
        the help format

        public void setSearchLimit(int searchLimit)
        Set the search limit.
        Parameters:
        searchLimit - the search limit

        Return the search limit.
        Returns:
        the search limit

        public boolean hasSearchLimit()
        Return true if the search is limited.
        Returns:
        true if the search is limited
